title: Pyrex Optimum Glass Rectangular Roaster High Resistance Easy Grip 35x23 Cm, 2.9L
features: PIREX rectangular pan optimum with two handles 35x23 kitchen pot
Anti scratch and can be cleaned in the dishwasher
description: Product Description Pyrex, a committed French brand! At Pyrex, we are committed to a free and uninhibited style of cooking, free from codes of perfection. For over 100 years, our Pyrex cookware and storage containers have been inspired by a love of French cuisine. Our commitment is to develop and produce healthy and durable glass products in our French factory, suitable for a wide range of uses! Previous page A dish to suit every situation! Discover our wide range of Pyrex oven dishes to suit all your kitchens! A COMMITMENT MADE TO LAST Sustainable products We are committed to bringing the highest quality cookware to every home in the world. Preserving our environment Our aim is to continually reduce our CO2 emissions, improve waste management and minimise our footprint on the planet. French manufacturing Pyrex glass has been made in France since 1970, symbolising the excellence of the French glass industry thanks to unrivalled expertise. Stop food waste! At Pyrex, we fight food waste with the conviction that food that is better preserved and consumed is also food that is thrown away less. Previous page Next page
